# rh-ssg-gui-and-links

Red Hat SSG review for graphical interface and links: UI element formatting
(bold, correct verbs — click/select/enter), screenshot guidelines, text
entry ("enter" not "type"), cross-reference format (`xref`), external-link
rules (no bare URLs or shorteners, descriptive link text), Red Hat docs links
(use "latest" in the path), and Knowledgebase article link formatting.
Checklist-driven, no CLI arguments; composed by `docs-review-style`. Takes
precedence over `ibm-sg-technical-elements` for UI and link checks on Red Hat
content.

**Plugin**: [docs-skills](index.md) | **:material-check: User-invocable**

## Usage

```bash
Review UI-element formatting and links in this Red Hat doc
```
